resources.string: %s applies for access to the microphone
In order for you to send voice messages, make video and audio and video calls, and use voice cloning, please allow us to access the microphone.
In order for you to take photos or videos to send to contacts, and to make video calls, please allow us to access the webcam.
In order for you to save photos and videos to your device, please allow us to write photos and videos to your device.
Allow microphone access in Settings->Apps->%s to use voice messages, video cameras, audio and video calls, and voice cloning as normal
Allow camera access in Settings->Apps->%s to use the photo, video and video calling functions as normal
Allow storage access in Settings->Apps->%s to use the function of saving photos and videos normally
